titleStmt.title: The United States Political Adviser for Germany ( Murphy ) to the Secretary of State

div.head: The United States Political Adviser for Germany ( Murphy ) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 585. Reference youri.e., the Chargé in Poland. 239 of September 15, 1 p.m. repeated to Dept as 257. General E. F. Wood denies having made any arrangement with Polish authorities concerning the transfer of Germans from Poland pari passu with transfers of Poles to Poland. He denies having seen Modzelewski and states that he has negotiated solely with General SpychalskiGen. Marian Spychalski, Chief of Staff of the Polish Army. in Warsaw and with General SwierczewskiGen. Karol Swierczewski. in Berlin. In both cases the discussion was limited to Polish DPsDisplaced persons. and Germans were not covered.
For your information, the British here state that the Polish authorities have told them also that such an agreement was made between the Poles and General Wood.
Sent to Warsaw as 38, repeated to Dept as 585.
